refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall derive performance requirements from worksite mission context, record these requirements with traceability, and manage updates including baselines and calibration history.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing into derivation, recording, and management clarifies distinct functional concerns and supports traceability and history maintenance as required by constraints.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by demonstrating documented performance targets traceable to worksite inputs and a maintained history of baseline and calibration updates.
sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

candidate_dps: Algorithmic derivation engine using worksite data inputs
Structured performance requirements database with versioning
Update management process with baseline and calibration tracking
selected_dp.selected_dp: Integrated performance requirements management system combining derivation algorithms, traceable recording, and update management

potential_sources: Tight coupling between derivation algorithms and data inputs
Versioning tightly coupled with update management
coupling_check.notes: The integrated DP logically groups related functions to minimize cross-module dependencies and supports traceability.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability and accuracy of worksite mission context data
Risk of data inconsistency if update management is not robust
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing update management separately if complexity grows.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Complete performance requirements derivation, recording, and management functionality

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives worksite mission context and operational data for derivation

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Outputs derived performance targets to operational planning modules

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data synchronization and update propagation across distributed modules

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as this module owns the full performance requirements management function.
Vehicle module has minimal direct involvement; diffusion risk if performance data is duplicated here.
No containment; risk of diffusion if performance logic is replicated in teleoperation.
No containment; some interface for safety alerts but unrelated to performance requirements.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing performance requirements derivation and management in NGHE Solution minimizes diffusion and supports traceability.
containment_risks: Potential diffusion if Vehicle or Teleoperation modules implement overlapping logic
Interface complexity with Network Link may cause synchronization issues
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Enforce strict ownership boundaries and interface contracts to prevent diffusion.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The refined FRs are clearly addressed by the selected integrated DP with logical grouping and traceability.

diffusion_risks: Risk of performance logic duplication in Vehicle or Teleoperation modules
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: High containment score for NGHE Solution module supports architectural clarity.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via documented traceability and history records within NGHE Solution module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of all sub-FRs to NGHE Solution module with well-defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Monitor and control interface usage to prevent diffusion
Consider future modularization if update management complexity increases

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition sufficiently clarifies the functional requirements, design parameters, and implementation module assignment with acceptable containment and diffusion risks.
next_level_sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; proceed to next decomposition level if desired.

assumptions: Worksite mission context data is accurate and timely
NGHE Solution module can handle integration complexity
open_risks: Potential diffusion of performance logic into other modules
Synchronization issues over Network Link interface
evidence_needed: Demonstration of traceability and history maintenance in NGHE Solution
Interface contract validation with Vehicle and Teleoperation modules
